name: swipe-in
title: Swipe In
description: Animation primitive — wraps any element to swipe in from a direction (left/right/up/down) on mount. Plays once by default; replayable via replayKey. Configurable distance, duration, delay, easing. Modular: HOC-style, composes with any child. Sibling to ScrollReveal (scroll-triggered) and NotificationArrive (drop-from-top spring). Honors `prefers-reduced-motion`. Use for staggered list reveals, hero entrances, WhatsApp message arrivals.
